description_long: This object is a modern manual toothbrush with a dark blue handle and tan bristles. The handle is ergonomically shaped, featuring a gentle curve and a slightly contoured grip area for comfortable holding. The bristle head is rectangular with rounded edges, densely packed with short, straight bristles arranged in parallel rows. The back of the head appears to have a textured surface, possibly for tongue cleaning. The handle has a small hole near the base, likely for hanging or storage. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for everyday personal oral hygiene.
description: A dark blue manual toothbrush with tan bristles, ergonomic handle, and a textured back on the head. The design is sleek and practical for daily use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full bristle arrangement and the ergonomic handle shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the bristle head and the gentle curve of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the textured back of the head and the handle's contour.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the bristle thickness and handle curvature.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The bristles are arranged in several parallel rows, densely packed and cut flat at the tips, forming a rectangular head with rounded corners. There are no visible multi-level or angled bristle features.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is gently curved with a contoured grip area, designed for ergonomic comfort. It is predominantly dark blue and features a small hole at the base for hanging.
